mapper.select: select member_id, email, password_hash, name, nickname, phone, profile_image_url, bio, email_verified, phone_verified, role, status, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at from members where email = #{email} limit 1

select member_id, email, password_hash, name, nickname, phone, profile_image_url, bio, email_verified, phone_verified, role, status, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at from members where member_id = #{memberId} limit 1
